title: Better Happy Ghast Movement
description: Optimize the movement control of Happy Ghasts!
body:
# Better Happy Ghast Movement
This client-side mod improves the control mechanics of happy ghasts.

The mod uses Mixin to override the happy ghast movement behavior, which may trigger alerts on servers with anti-cheat systems.

## Controls

- **W** - Move horizontally forward
- **S** - Move horizontally backward
- **A** - Move left
- **D** - Move right
- **Space** - Move upward
- **Shift** - Move downward
- **Double click Shift** - Dismount
